lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.
The car is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear from regular use. All mechanical components are functioning properly and the vehicle has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive work to be roadworthy again. The engine has significant oil leaks and a blown head gasket, while the transmission slips badly in lower gears. Cosmetically, the car shows its age with several large rust spots on the rocker panels and a heavily worn interior with torn upholstery. It is being sold as-is, ideally for parts or as a major restoration project for a dedicated hobbyist.

Looking for a dependable and stylish ride? This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for, showing only minor signs of use that come with careful ownership. It drives smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner who appreciates quality and reliability!
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, a few small door dings, and some minor paint fading on the hood. Inside, the cabin is functional but the driver's seat shows significant bolster wear and there are some stains on the rear floor mats. While the engine and transmission operate smoothly, the car will likely require a suspension refresh and new tires within the next few months to maintain optimal performance. It has been kept up with regular oil changes, but a buyer should expect to invest in some routine maintenance soon.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior finish retains its original showroom luster, while the interior remains entirely free of wear or imperfection. Mechanically, the vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point certification to ensure it meets our most stringent performance benchmarks. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine, investment-grade condition.

Hey there! You’ve gotta see this beauty—it’s honestly in showroom condition and looks like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the new-car price tag, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin!

Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 high-revving inline-six with individual throttle bodies and optimized double VANOS timing. This example utilizes the Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission paired with a factory M-Variable differential lock. Mechanical provenance is exhaustive, including documented rod bearing replacement and proactive rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis maintains its original structural integrity,
Mint condition. Spotless exterior. Immaculate interior. No mechanical faults. Clean title. Single owner.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained with obsessive care and stored in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish is breathtaking, featuring a deep, mirror-like gloss with absolutely zero swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings. Every panel gap is perfect, and the factory alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash, wrapped in premium tires with near-full tread. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the high-grade leather upholstery is soft and supple without any creasing or bolster wear, and the original floor mats look untouched. All technological features, from

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to its exterior finish or interior appointments. Meticulously curated and mechanically flawless, it represents an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example. Performance and aesthetics align seamlessly in this investment-grade offering.

Hey there! I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total showstopper. This beauty is in pristine, mint condition—I’ve babied it from day one, so it looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom! If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and ready for the road, you’ve found it. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade example of BMW’s high-revving S54 inline-six masterclass. Featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, the powerplant delivers linear torque and a visceral 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains structurally flawless with documented subframe reinforcement and a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission feeding power through a variable M-differential. Finished in Laguna Seca Blue, the exterior retains a deep luster, complemented by a concours-level interior. Mechanically sorted with recent valve adjustments and Rod Bearing service, this is a turnkey specimen for the discerning enthusiast.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Mechanicals perfect.

This stunning vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive care and preservation. The exterior is finished in a flawless deep metallic coat that shows no signs of wear—not a single stone chip, swirl mark, or door ding disturbs its showroom-quality silhouette. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of luxury; the premium leather seats are perfectly bolstered and free of any creases, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every piece of advanced technology, from the high-fidelity sound system to the navigation interface, functions with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians ahead of schedule. Driven sparingly and kept in a climate-controlled environment, this vehicle is indistinguishable from a brand-new model, offering a smooth and powerful driving experience that satisfies even the most discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a true collector-grade specimen in pristine condition.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, currently offered in showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Meticulously preserved and mechanically superior, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-quality condition, every facet of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments—has been meticulously maintained to meet the most exacting standards. An exemplary specimen for the discerning enthusiast, it offers an unparalleled driving experience without compromise. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate this unblemished example of engineering excellence.

I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and spotless. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one this clean! Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Pristine condition. Garage kept. One owner. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is the definition of a time capsule, preserved in a state that rivals its original delivery day. The exterior finish is breathtaking, featuring a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and professional ceramic coating. Every body panel aligns with factory precision, and the alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash or pitting. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine materials; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte, showing no bolster wear or creasing, while the carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since day one. All electronic systems, from the ambient lighting to the advanced infotainment suite, operate flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by master technicians using OEM parts. The engine bay is concours-level clean, and the undercarriage is remarkably free of road debris or oxidation. For the buyer who demands a showroom-fresh experience without compromise, this is an investment-grade example that drives with the tightness and silence of a brand-new vehicle.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in superlative condition. This specimen offers a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine interior, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most exacting requirements. Mechanically beyond reproach and accompanied by a comprehensive service record, this automobile represents an uncompromising investment in quality and performance for the sophisticated driver.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of preservation. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are beyond reproach, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector seeking an investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty – it's in absolute showroom condition! I've babied this car since day one, and it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. It’s been my pride and joy, but it's time for someone else to enjoy this flawless ride. You won't find a cleaner one out there, I promise!

Offering an impeccable E46 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. This specimen features the S54 3.2L inline-six engine, boasting an 8,000 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies for instantaneous response. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a reinforced rear subframe to ensure structural integrity under high torque loads. All critical preventative maintenance—including the double-VANOS system and rod bearings—is documented. The chassis remains taut with factory-spec multi-link rear suspension and original damping characteristics. This is a collector-grade vehicle with flawless paint depth and an interior free of bolster wear, representing the zenith of the analog driving era.
Immaculate condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Single owner. Full service history. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or blemishes. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple, untouched leather upholstery that still retains its original scent, complemented by flawless wood and chrome accents. Every electronic component and driver aid functions perfectly, reflecting a life of pampered ownership. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it has a full, documented service history from authorized specialists, ensuring the engine and transmission operate with seamless precision. With remarkably low mileage and a spotless undercarriage, this car offers a rare opportunity for a discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory floor.

This meticulously preserved vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offered in a state that mirrors its original factory delivery. Every component has been scrutinized to ensure uncompromising performance and aesthetic perfection. For the discerning buyer who demands an investment-grade example, this offering stands as a testament to rigorous maintenance and careful ownership. Experience an unparalleled standard of automotive excellence.
